## 📋 Pull Request Description

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security improvement

### 📝 Description
Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

### 🔄 Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)
Related to # (issue number)

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] Updated existing tests
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### 📚 Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated
- [ ] GoDoc comments updated
- [ ] CLI help updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated

### 🛡️ Security Considerations
- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Security considerations documented

### 🚀 Deployment
- [ ] Ready for immediate deployment
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires configuration changes
- [ ] Breaking changes requiring user action

### 📊 Performance Impact
- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Improved performance
- [ ] Performance regression (with justification)

### 📋 Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

### 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

### 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
If this PR changes UI/CLI output, add screenshots here.

### 📖 Testing Instructions
Provide clear instructions for how to test this PR:

```bash
# Example testing commands
go build -o depsec main.go
./depsec scan --pkg example --version 1.0.0 --ecosystem node
```

---

## 🤝 Review Process

### 👀 What to Review
- [ ] Code logic and implementation
- [ ] Test coverage and quality
- [ ] Documentation accuracy
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] Breaking changes

### ✅ Approval Criteria
- [ ] Code is well-written and maintainable
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive and passing
- [ ] Documentation is accurate and complete
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Performance is acceptable
- [ ] Breaking changes are justified and documented

---

**🛡️ DepSec - Protecting your dependencies from supply chain attacks**
